name: Chip Jackson
abstract: Chip Jackson is an American jazz double bass player. He has played in trios with Billy Taylor and Elvin Jones.

concerts.label: A Chuck Mangione Concert with Concert Orchestra
JVC Jazz Festival: A Tribute to "Trane"
Steinway and Sons 150th Anniversary Celebration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: I did some gigs years ago, Warren Vache, Michael Hashim on saxophone, James Chirillo the guitarist, Chip Jackson on bass and Dennis Mackrel who was here with the Dizzy band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003
